STSBOSSANCIENTS-FORM_SHIFT_POWER.title: Form Shift
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FORM_SHIFT_POWER.descrip: When taking damage, reduce an equal amount of stacks (even if [gold]Blocked[/gold]). When the stacks are removed, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the original stack amount at the time of application, gain half that amount of [gold]Thorns[/gold], then gain original stacks +10 [gold]Form Shift[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FORM_SHIFT_POWER.smartDe:
When taking damage, reduce an equal amount of stacks (even if [gold]Blocked[/gold]). When the stacks are removed, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the original stack amount at the time of application, gain half that amount of [gold]Thorns[/gold], then gain original stacks +10 [gold]Form Shift[/gold].
Current stacks: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LUBRICATED_POWER.title: Special Slippery
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LUBRICATED_POWER.descrip: When taking attack damage, change that damage to [blue]1[/blue], then reduce [blue]1[/blue] stack.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LUBRICATED_POWER.smartDe:
When taking attack damage, change that damage to [blue]1[/blue], then reduce [blue]1[/blue] stack.
Remaining stacks: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LOSE_ENERGY_NEXT_TURN_PO: At the start of your next turn, lose an amount of energy.
At the start of your next turn, lose {Amount:energyIcons()}.
